auth.registerSubtitle: No credit card. Add your first domain in under a minute.

marketing.heroBlurb: {brand} watches your endpoints, certificates and DNS every 30 seconds — then tells the right person the moment something breaks. Own your data, run it anywhere, and give customers a status page they actually trust.
marketing.featuresTitle: Replace the five tools you're duct-taping together
marketing.featuresBlurb: {brand} is one control plane for uptime, latency, certificates and alerting — self-hosted, so the data never leaves your infrastructure.
marketing.feature1Body: HTTP, HTTPS, TCP, ICMP, DNS and SSL-expiry checks — one control plane instead of five tools.
marketing.feature2Body: Slack, email, webhooks and Telegram, with de-duplication — so one outage isn't fifty pings.
marketing.feature3Body: Every query is scoped to an org. Teams share an instance without sharing data.
marketing.feature4Body: p50/p95 response times per endpoint, not just a binary up/down flag.
marketing.feature5Body: Every alert arrives with a plain-English explanation of what likely broke, and where to look first.
marketing.howBlurb: No agents, no sidecars, no YAML archaeology.
marketing.step1Body: Create a project per app or team. Every monitor lives in one, so dashboards and status pages stay organised as you grow.
marketing.step2Body: Point {brand} at a URL, host or cluster. It starts probing on your interval within seconds — no agent to install.
marketing.step3Body: Flip one switch to share a public page grouped by project. Customers see what's up; they never see your internals.
marketing.statusTitle: A page your customers can trust
marketing.statusBlurb: Group domains by project, publish on your own domain, and keep targets, IPs and internals private — only names and status are ever exposed.
marketing.statusPrivacyNote: Targets, IPs and check config are never exposed publicly.
marketing.ctaTitle: Stop finding out from your customers.
marketing.ctaBlurb: Spin up {brand}, add your first domain, and get alerted before anyone opens a ticket.
marketing.ctaFinePrint: Free to start — no credit card.

monitors.title: Monitors
monitors.subtitle: Websites, APIs, ports and certificates — probed by Prometheus + Blackbox.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Currently-firing alerts for your organization only.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Run PromQL against your own metrics. Every query is automatically scoped to your organization.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group your monitors by application or team.

statusPage.title: Status page
statusPage.subtitle: Publish a public page your customers can trust. Nothing is exposed until you say so.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Get alerted the moment something goes down — on Slack, email, a webhook or Telegram.

maintenance.title: Maintenance windows
maintenance.subtitle: Planning a deploy or known downtime? Tell {brand} in advance so it doesn't cry wolf.

billing.title: Plans & billing
billing.subtitle: Pay as you go by the hour, or subscribe monthly. It's your call.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage monitors from a script, a pipeline, or your own tooling.

system.subtitle: Operator access to the underlying monitoring engines.
